footer_powered_by: Powered by Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
upload_title: Tsɔ atike foto va afi sia
upload_subtitle: alo dze click de browser dzi / zã kamera
select_prompt: Trɔ ame si le wo atike dome
select_subtitle: Tsi kard si atrɔ, eye abe hã ŋlɔ
result_treatment_sub: Yi nu siwo le ete la dzi na dɔwɔwɔ nuwò la
result_prevention_sub: Yi nu siawo na mègaɖo nuwò la kpɔ
result_healthy_msg: Nyaɖiɖi nyuie! Nuwò la kpɔ abe dɔ le la ene.
result_healthy_sub: Yi tips siawo na nàto esia nu.
result_at_risk_msg: Nuwò la mele vovovo me o gake lé dzesi gbãtɔwo.
result_at_risk_sub: Wɔ dɔ wɔ fifia na gbedzi vovovo.
result_infected_sub: Yi dɔwɔwɔ nuɖoɖo le ete la dzi enumake.
result_export_footer: Powered by AgroSense — Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
error_unexpected_response: Server returned an unexpected response. Check Django logs.
error_network_prod_cross_origin: Cannot reach the API (wrong URL, CORS, or backend waking/sleeping on Render). Confirm VITE_API_BASE_URL has no typo; on Render set CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS to this site's exact https origin (and preview URLs if you use them). Retry after 30-60s on cold start.
error_network_prod_same_origin: Cannot reach the API. Same-origin /api should proxy via repo-root vercel.json. Update the rewrite destination to your Render URL, redeploy Vercel, or set VITE_API_BASE_URL to that URL and redeploy.
error_network_dev: Cannot reach the API. Local dev: (1) In backend: pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 (2) In frontend: npm run dev. Leave VITE_API_BASE_URL empty in frontend/.env so /api proxies to Django.
error_file_type: Tsɔ jpg, png, alo webp foto.
error_no_results: Atike aɖeke mele ŋu o. Dze foto si le lã o.
history_empty: No scans yet. Scan your first plant!
history_empty_sub: Your past diagnoses will appear here.
history_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all scan history?
settings_built_with: Built with Plant.id · Cursor · Khaya AI
lab_precision_body: Our models are trained on over 500,000 verified pathological samples of regional crops.
expert_insights_body: Receive instant organic treatment recommendations and preventative strategies.
camera_error_denied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permissions and try again.
rightpanel_home_title: Di gbe na ati siwo le nuwò me
rightpanel_home_desc: Ðo foto la tso nuwò siwo me la dzi eye nàxɔ AI adwene le sekond 8 me.
rightpanel_feature_langs_body: Adwene le Zulu, Xhosa, Swahili kple bubuwo me
rightpanel_result_desc: Kpɔ dɔ lɔme ɖeɖe la na nuwò eye yi nu siwo wɔ ete la dzi.
rightpanel_tip_1: Ðo foto le ŋdɔ hã me na nyuie wɔ
rightpanel_tip_2: Di bliboa na nu siwo vɔ̃ la dzi
rightpanel_tip_3: Kpɔ dɔɖeɖe siaɖe sene nàkpɔ nuwò la gbɔwɔ
rightpanel_tip_4: Yɔ ɖeɖefia la kple agronomist si le wò nuto
rightpanel_history_desc: Wò scan 20 xoxo la xaxa la vɔvɔ. Di biabia la dzi eye nàkpɔ diagnosis blibo la.
rightpanel_history_auto_body: Scan ɖesiaɖe la xaxa le wò device dzi
rightpanel_history_limit_body: Xoxo gbɔtɔwo la trɔ asi le vɔvɔ me
rightpanel_settings_desc: Ðo gbe kple preferences. Wɔaxa settings la le wò device dzi la vɔvɔ.
rightpanel_supported_langs_sub: UI kple AI adwene a wògbugbɔ
